onboarding.step1Description: Your first conversation is about you! Hit record and tell your own story — your memories, your life, in your own words. After that, sit down with family members to capture theirs.
onboarding.step2Description: Our AI transcribes the conversation, extracts names, dates, relationships, and key stories — all automatically.
onboarding.step3Description: Watch your family tree grow like a living canopy. Each person becomes a warm node, connected by organic branches of ancestry.
onboarding.step4Description: AI writes biographies, creates memory books, and preserves the voices and stories of your loved ones for generations.
onboarding.chooseLanguageSubtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings
onboarding.firstNode: You'll be the first node in your family tree
onboarding.enterNameMessage: We need at least your first name to place you in your family tree.
onboarding.setupError: Could not complete setup. Is Supabase running?

about.tagline: Every family has a story worth preserving.
about.missionBody:
MATRA exists to help families preserve the stories, voices, and wisdom of the people they love — before those memories are lost to time.

We believe that every grandmother's recipe, every grandfather's adventure, every parent's lesson deserves to live on. Not just as fading memories, but as rich, interconnected stories your family can return to for generations.
about.howRecordDesc: Sit down with a family member and have a real conversation. MATRA captures every word.
about.howDiscoverDesc: AI extracts names, dates, relationships, and stories — building your family's narrative automatically.
about.howPreserveDesc: Your family tree grows like a living canopy. Stories become permanent branches of your heritage.
about.valueGrowth: Growth - Every conversation plants a new seed in your family's story.
about.valuePrivacy: Privacy - Your family's stories belong to you — always.
about.valueHeritage: Heritage - Every culture, every language, every family matters.
about.valueConnection: Connection - Technology should bring families closer, not apart.
about.footer: Made with care for families everywhere.

layout.accountDeactivatedMessage: Your account was deactivated. Would you like to reactivate it and restore your data?
layout.reactivationFailed: Could not restore your account. Please check your connection and try again.

notifications.lineageReadyBody: Your conversation has been transcribed and analyzed. Tap to see new connections on your lineage map.
notifications.processingFailedBody: Something went wrong while analyzing your conversation. Please try again.

invite.title: Invite Family
invite.subtitle: Share your family tree with relatives. They'll join your tree and their connections will merge automatically.
invite.shareMessage: {{name}} invited you to join their family tree on MATRA! Open this link to connect: {{link}}
invite.revokeMessage: This will invalidate the invitation link. The person won't be able to join.
invite.acceptExplanation: Accepting will connect your family trees. Shared relatives will be merged automatically, and new people will be added to your tree.
invite.welcomeMessage: You've joined {{group}}. {{merged}} people matched and {{created}} new people were added to the tree.
